description: EBS Orphaned Snapshot Detection — Identifies EBS snapshots whose source volume has been deleted, incurring storage cost with no functional value.

cost.note: EBS snapshot storage is charged at $0.05/GB-month for the actual stored data blocks (us-east-1).

severity_rules.name: orphaned_snapshot_deleted_volume
severity_rules.description: Snapshot whose source volume no longer exists. Provides no recovery value for an active volume; accumulates storage cost indefinitely.
